sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id Int32, vector1 Array(Float64), vector2 Array(Float64));
UPDATE test_vectors SET vector1 = [7, 8, 9] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) FROM test_vectors WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, L2SquaredDistance(vector1, vector2) AS distance FROM test_vectors;
